=== info.txt

===================
===================
Bob Dylan
BancorpSouth Center
Tupelo, Mississippi
2002.02.18

Unknown origin.No info about lineage and taper
Very good sound

1 I Am The Man, Thomas (acoustic) 
2 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 
3 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic) (Larry on cittern and Charlie on dobro) 
4 Searching For A Soldier's Grave (acoustic) (Larry on mandolin and Bob on harp)
5 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum 
6 Just Like A Woman (Bob on harp and Larry on pedal steel) 
7 Lonesome Day Blues (Larry on slide guitar) 
8 High Water (For Charley Patton) (Larry on banjo and Charlie on slide guitar) 
9 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 
10 Masters Of War (acoustic) (Charlie on dobro) 
11 Tangled up In Blue (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 


1 Summer Days (Tony on standup bass) 
2 Sugar Baby (Tony on standup bass) 
3 The Wicked Messenger (Bob on harp) 
4 Like A Rolling Stone 
5 Love Sick 
6 Honest With Me (Larry on slide guitar) 
7 Forever Young (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 
8 All Along The Watchtower 
9 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) 
 

Concert # 1397 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 14 of the 2002 US Winter Tour. 2002 concert # 14.

Concert # 14 with the 13th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

1–4, 9–11, 18, 20 acoustic with the band.
2, 4, 6, 9, 11, 14, 18 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
3 Larry Campbell (cittern).
1, 4, 18, 20 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).

 

8 new songs (40%) compared to previous concert. No new songs for this tour.
